{{Quote|There has been a disturbance in the galaxy...|Kelen Wordkal|<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>}}
'''Kelen Wordkal''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who worked as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Mos Eisley Police Authority]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Wordkal often patrolled the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] in a [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]].
[[File:KelenWordkal.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Kelen Wordkal's Z-95 Headhunter]]

==Behind the scenes==
Kelen Wordkal was a low-level, Tier 2 [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] (NPC) in the [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] portion of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011. His Z-95 could often be found in space near the [[Tatooine Space Station]].
